text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's all tiny 'n' round! And lookit da way it
sparkles!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's lip balm. Because, you know, today's your
birthday, isn't it? I got it as a present.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa, dat's way too fancy! Wasn't it expensive?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh... sorry. My stylist recommended it, and I
wasn't thinking in the moment... I didn't mean to
make you feel bad.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa, I didn't say that! I 'preciate it! Really!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean, ya went through all the trouble to get me
somethin' nice—I'm over the MOON!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's the thing though. I'm not deservin' of a gift
so amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Agh, it's got me feelin' all jumbled around! Da
hell'd ya do that for?! And thanks!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Heh, hahaha. I couldn't have asked for a better
reaction, Tamamo.
